body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
The cesm2_albedo artifact was renamed to sw_albedo in ClimaArtifacts PR #97. This PR also added
a new dataset with two new albedo variables. This commit updates the Artifacts accessor functions for albedo and adds tests for the new dataset.

An example use of the new dataset is

```
albedo = PrescribedSurfaceAlbedo{FT}(
            start_date,
            space;
            albedo_file_path = ClimaLand.Artifacts.ceres_albedo_dataset_path(),
            varname ="św_alb_clr",
        )
``` 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
- added the `ceres_albedo_dataset_path` function
- changed `cesm2_albedo_dataset_folder()` to `sw_albedo_dataset_folder()`
- changed cesm2 to sw_albedo in Artifact.toml
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included

-->

title: Replace cesm2_albedo artifact with sw_albedo
